\tzpentry{ID5664}{Potential Energy Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5664 introduces Potential Energy Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ U_{\mathrm{mag}} = \int_0^R\int_0^\pi\int_0^{2\pi} \frac{|\mathbf{B}(\mathbf{r},t)|^2}{2\mu_0}\,r^2\sin\theta\,dr\,d\theta\,d\phi\,. \]
